name: Tomato Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mash the tomatoes.
2. Add baking soda, eggs, and cracker crumbs to the mashed tomatoes.
3. Form the mixture into patties.
4. Heat a skillet over medium heat.
5. Fry the patties until golden brown on both sides.
6. Serve with pancake syrup if desired.
